title: InstCombine: Use canonicalizing getFPClassConstant when simplifying exp
author: arsenm
description: Also make sure to emit a literal nan if the result must be a nan.

comments.author: arsenm
comments.body:
* **#174850** 👈 (View in Graphite) * `main`

This stack of pull requests is managed by Graphite. Learn more about stacking.

comments.author: llvm-ci
